name: for_abbr
description: TinyMCE plugin for_abbr: semantic <abbr> markup with optional glossary

scripts.build-copy: mkdir -p ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_abbr/ ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/for_abbr/ && mkdir -p ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_abbr/ ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/for_abbr/
